name: hia-documentation-sys-main
description: Core monorepo for the HIA documentation engineering system.

scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run devtools:check
scripts.distribution:check: node scripts/check-distribution-readiness.mjs && node scripts/check-public-release-plan.mjs && node scripts/check-public-package-contents.mjs
scripts.distribution:check:publish-ready: node scripts/check-distribution-readiness.mjs --publish-ready && node scripts/check-public-release-plan.mjs --publish-ready && node scripts/check-public-package-contents.mjs
scripts.release:gate: pnpm run check && pnpm run schema:check && pnpm run schema:site && pnpm run distribution:check && pnpm run reference:definition:check && node scripts/release-gate-jsdoc-smoke.mjs && pnpm run governance:check && pnpm run license:audit
scripts.release:gate:publish-ready: pnpm run check && pnpm run schema:check && pnpm run schema:site && pnpm run distribution:check:publish-ready && pnpm run reference:definition:check && node scripts/release-gate-jsdoc-smoke.mjs && pnpm run governance:check && pnpm run license:audit
